# Scantient

> API security scanner for developers and small teams. Find exposed API keys, broken auth, and missing security headers in 60 seconds. No SDK. No code access.

Scantient is an external API security scanner that runs 20 automated checks on your API endpoints before you deploy. It integrates into your CI pipeline as a GitHub Action.

## What Scantient Checks

- Secret exposure in API responses (API keys, tokens, credentials)
- JWT security: algorithm validation, expiry, signature verification
- Authentication: missing auth, broken auth patterns
- CORS misconfiguration
- Rate limiting presence and configuration
- Security headers: CSP, HSTS, X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options
- HTTPS enforcement
- Error verbosity and information disclosure

## Pricing

- Maker LTD: $79 one-time, lifetime access, unlimited scans
- Pro: $399/month, team features, CI/CD integration, compliance reports
- Enterprise: Custom pricing, SLA, dedicated support

## Key Pages

- / — Homepage and product overview
- /pricing — Plan comparison
- /score — Free instant security score for any API
- /vs-gitguardian — Scantient vs GitGuardian comparison
- /vs-snyk — Scantient vs Snyk comparison
- /vs-checkmarx — Scantient vs Checkmarx comparison
- /blog — API security guides and tutorials
- /docs/github-action — GitHub Action integration docs
